lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: I hear you are the human that Veldaban has employed to help rebuild the statue. How is that going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you know about that?

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: Veldaban is in my employ.

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: Veldaban told me about your involvement in the rebuilding of the statue. Congratulations.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: I am Bisi. I am the Supreme Commander of the Black Guard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought Veldaban was in command?

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: Only of our regiment in Keldagrim, and a most honourable position it is as well.

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: But the Black Guard has many regiments across the dwarven realm. All the Commanders of those regiments report to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes, I helped Commander Lawgof once, in his fight against the goblins.

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: That's good to hear.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What news have you?

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: Apart from the statue of King Alvis falling down, you mean? I don't know. There is something suspicious about the whole case.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you mean?

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: We've had several incidents recently. For a while we even closed off the city. And now this.

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: The Red Axe has withdrawn from the city to some unknown location. I believe Commander Veldaban has asked you to assist him in finding their secret headquarters?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes, you're right.

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: Apart from you helping to rebuild the statue for the [company name]?

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: There seems to be some general unrest in the city. There is trouble brewing in Keldagrim.

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: But I'm sure Commander Veldaban is on top of it. He's a very capable officer, and I'm starting to get too old for this sort of thing.

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: Well, I heard that you helped Veldaban's father in the mines to the south. That's caused quite a bit of an upset in the Consortium, so I understand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How so?

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: The amount of wealth that goldmine is generating might cause some distortion in the balance of power in the Consortium. But we'll see.

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: Apart from that there seems to be some general unrest in the city. Trouble is brewing in Keldagrim.

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: But I'm sure Commander Veldaban is on top of it. He's a very capable officer, and I'm starting to get too old for this sort of thing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I must go now.

lines.speaker: Supreme Commander
lines.text: Then I bid you farewell, human.
